description: Defines every buyer persona TradeFlow targets. Used by the email writer to select the right tone, opening hook, and pain points. Linked from container_types.json via buyer_archetype_ids.

buyer_archetypes.label: Care home manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: CQC compliance — a failed inspection or enforcement notice puts the registration at risk
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: No in-house maintenance team means every fault depends on finding a reliable contractor quickly
example_openers: Keeping on top of maintenance is one less thing to worry about before your next CQC visit.
We work with a number of registered managers in [area] who need contractors they can trust at short notice.

buyer_archetypes.label: Facilities coordinator
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Managing multiple contractors across a site with no single reliable point of contact
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Getting sign-off on spend means needing clear quotes and documented compliance
avoid: pitching over their head to the CEO
example_openers: If you're managing maintenance across a busy site, we make it straightforward — one point of contact, fully documented.
We help facilities teams at [container type] keep on top of planned and reactive works without the back-and-forth.

buyer_archetypes.label: Hospitality manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Guest-facing faults that need fixing before the next check-in or service
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Works that overrun into trading hours cost more than the job itself
example_openers: We work around your trading hours — so a fault on Monday morning is sorted before your lunchtime covers.
Maintenance that fits around your guests, not the other way around.

buyer_archetypes.label: General manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Unplanned maintenance spend disrupting cash flow and operations
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Compliance deadlines (gas safety, EICR, EHO) that can't be missed
avoid: cold opener with no local hook
example_openers: Running a [container type] in [area] means maintenance can't wait — we're on call when you need us.
We keep [container type] owners in [area] compliant and operational without the hassle.

buyer_archetypes.label: School business manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Coordinating works during term breaks on a fixed annual budget
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Safeguarding obligations mean every contractor must be DBS-checked and site-inducted
example_openers: We work with schools across [area] to schedule maintenance during holidays — fully DBS-checked and Ofsted-aware.
Planning ahead for summer works? We help school business managers get quotes early and contractors confirmed.

buyer_archetypes.label: Practice manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Any downtime in a clinical or regulated environment costs revenue and risks CQC compliance
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Finding contractors who understand clinical environments and can work outside appointment hours
example_openers: We carry out works outside your appointment hours so your patients never notice a thing.
Maintenance in a clinical environment needs the right contractor — we understand CQC requirements and work to your schedule.

buyer_archetypes.label: Property manager
buyer_archetypes.primary_pain: Managing compliance across a multi-site portfolio with reliable documented records
buyer_archetypes.secondary_pain: Tenant satisfaction depends on issues being resolved fast without disrupting neighbouring occupants
example_openers: We support commercial property managers across [area] with planned maintenance, reactive cover, and full compliance documentation.
One contractor across your portfolio — EICR, gas safety, fabric maintenance — all documented and on file.
